transcript.text: Hello. I have insomnia because I didn't, um, do very much writing yesterday because I spent all day fixing things and it's 3.30 in the morning now and I was going to go writing right now, but I figured I'd do some talking.

And since I haven't done talking video for such a long time, I figured I'd give it a try doing it laying here in my tent. Um, I just started listening to audio stuff for the first time, um, since I've been traveling. Um, I've been listening to music only and, uh, all of a sudden I was like, well, let me do talking because, you know, it gives you, it turns your brain on when you listen.

I was listening to Bashar just now. So I just had a, uh, uh, the idea to do where miracles come from. So, um, everybody knows about miracles. Um, you know, um, uh, um, uh, teardrops coming out of Virgin Mary statues at the church, uh, blood coming out of Jesus's hands at the church.
Um, um, um, spontaneous, uh, uh, healing, um, of like cancer or whatever. Um, I've had my experience with, um, with, uh, miracles myself. Uh, you see my teeth here.
Um, I had, uh, I had gaped teeth and, uh, one morning I woke up and I had like gum coming down in between and I was like, what? And I went and looked in the mirror and my teeth had come together.

Um, and, uh, three days before that, this isn't, I think March of 2000, um, a crack that was all the way across my windshield on my van and the front windshield and stopped only three inches from the edge.
It had been there four years, uh, was gone one morning. It was just gone.
And, uh, so that's my experience with miracles. And, um, so what happens? Where do they come from? Who does it?
Um, well, I think we'd fix, we did it. So, like, I fixed my crack on my windshield. But what part of me?
Well, I got the idea to do this because, um, people asked Bashar where crop circles come from.
And he said, um, you do the crop circles. The different levels of your consciousness do the crop circles.
So I, so I was thinking like, what? We do the crop circles. Like, what certain level of our consciousness?
And, but then he also says that, you know, when Daryl Anka channels Bashar, he, uh, Bashar is actually him in the future.
So I had the idea to think, well, maybe my windshield crack break fixing was me in the future coming back in time in a spaceship or something and fixing this windshield in my car.
It was me and a future reincarnation from a parallel universe came back, just like Bashar, and said, oh, cool, let's fix his windshield and make him excited about this kind of stuff.

So, um, so like if somebody sees, is a church and sees, um, the Jesus sweating, uh, blood out of his hand, um, bleeding, then that is that person in a spaceship comes back in time and goes, oh, let's, let's, let's do this for him and freak him out and make him excited.
So, um, I think that's what Bashar meant when he said, we do the crop circles.
I think he said, um, I think that's what he meant.
I think, I think, I think it, I think it is aliens who do the crop circles, but it's, it's the aliens that are us in the future coming back in time.
Um, um, that's the different level of our consciousness.
Um, and, uh, you know, when you see those little balls flying around, that's just the, uh, the basically technology doing it like, like little, little machines doing it.
Only, the only, it's the level of technology that's so highly advanced that it's different from what we, maybe what we would even, um, see as technology.
It's kind of technology that you could even maybe create with your mind.
But, um, anyways, I just kind of spontaneously decided to do this particular subject.
So that's that.
